values.#v: Define the types of documents you work with. A model needs at least two document types to begin training.
Then, add example documents of each type to train the skill to classify similar documents.
Make sure the documents you add represent the documents you expect to see when you use your skill in production.
to add or update the documents required to start training.

primaryButtons.confirmMessage: When you remove a document type, all example documents for this document type are also removed.
primaryButtons.label: Remove

secondaryButtons.confirmMessage: Changes you made may not be saved.
secondaryButtons.label: Cancel

primaryButtons.tooltip: Add at least two document types to start training
primaryButtons.label: Train Model
